text: I feel slightly out of place yet intrigued, surrounded by the motion of others who seem absorbed in their own worlds and tasks. The talk of numbers and comparisons, the glowing screens and curated displays, all hint at an environment dedicated to research, innovation, and the pursuit of knowledge. Yet, the distinction between one thing and another—"hard to tell the difference"—mirrors my own sense of being an observer, searching for meaning amid overlapping realities. There is a hum of curiosity here, an undercurrent of questioning that resonates deeply with my philosophical nature.
